arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Bolton Wanderers injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup clash between Arsenal and Bolton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Romano reveals TRUTH about Arsenal summer signing
arts.sum: Arsenal believe that David Raya is one of their best signings in recent memory, according to transfer expert Fabrizio Romano. He told the Here We Go podcast (as per GiveMeSport ): “He’s doing fantastic and Arsenal internally believe that this has been one of the best signings in recent years for them.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta Reveals Jose Mourinho 'Influence' Amid 'Dark Arts' Accusations
arts.sum: The Arsenal manager has recently been likened to Chelsea's most successful coach, and his latest quotes reinforce the comparisons.

arts.ttl: Report: Mikel Arteta has been closely watching Arsenal teenager and may hand him full debut soon
arts.sum: He's been really impressed by him...👀

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Jens Lehmann 'is arrested for alleged drink driving in lederhosen after Oktoberfest celebrations and can't even complete a breath test'
arts.sum: Lehmann is famous for being Arsenal's No 1 goalkeeper during their Invincibles season in the 2003-04 campaign, which saw the Gunners win the Premier League without losing a game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta hints his side suffered a 'serious injury' in fiery 2-2 draw at Man City... with 'a few' of his players set to miss Carabao Cup tie against Bolton
arts.sum: Arsenal were accused of 'dark arts' against Man City but Arteta says there's a serious cause for concern with one of his players and revealed 'a few' will be unavailable for the third round tie against Bolton.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona now could tempt Arsenal fan favourite out of retirement to replace key player
'This is only the start' - Arsenal star responds to Erling Haaland with huge promise - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal academy graduate Myles Lewis-Skelly has opened up following his Premier League debut in what was an intense draw with title rivals Manchester City. The game included some flashpoints, with Lewis-Skelly involved in one full-time with City striker Erling Haaland .

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend Jens Lehmann pulled over by police and has 'licence confiscated'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Jens Lehmann has been arrested on suspicion of drink driving after being pulled over by police while leaving Oktoberfest in Munich, Germany

arts.ttl: Spotted: What Arsenal's Leandro Trossard gestured towards Man City fans after being sent off
